title: In Britain, July 4 Is Mostly Just a Saturday
summary_full: Independence Day does not loom large in Britain’s public imagination, though cultural institutions did note the day and King Charles III issued a statement.
summary_public: Independence Day does not loom large in Britain’s public imagination, though cultural institutions did note the day and King Charles III issued a statement.
